rationale: Acting on Review 1 produces a strictly better PR: its single finding is correct per the diff (Degree.lean:5 directly references finrank_sup_adjoin_simple_eq_mul_two et al. from the newly extended Quadratic.lean but imports only SquareClass), and maintainers of a Lean project value explicit (non-transitive) imports for placement hygiene. Review 2's approval therefore leaves an avoidable dependency opacity that the author would not have fixed.
